rulings.Case Title: YINGCHEN SONG VS. RENTAL CAR FINANCE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Pltfs' Expert
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF INTEL CORPORATION, YINGCHEN SONG, ZHENHUA CHEN, JUNHU LIU, LEJIA DING's Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Pltfs' Expert Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NAVEEN SINGHA VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF NAVEEN SINGHA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD Grant - Good cause includes break down in attorney client relationship and non payment and client indicating not wanting this counsel. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZELJKO MARKOVIC VS. COUNTRYWIDE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2013, line 3. Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Deny - 1. Failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits with competent evidence 2. Also no proof of service. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLD COURT LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. RAFAEL BENHUR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT BENHUR RAFAEL'S Mtn For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship Deny - Stipulation provided waiver and defendant breached the stipulation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MURPHY INVESTMENTS VS. LENORE BABIONE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT LENORE BABIONE'S Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Grant - Registered Process Server declaration lacking in detail plus conflict as to where registered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. ANA FLORES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT ANA FLORES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Off calendar - Moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005, in future moving party counsel shall comply with SFLR 2.6C. = (501/REQ)
